mapper.sql: select b.id, b.batch_no as batchNo, b.bank_account_no_mask as bankAccountNoMask, b.bank_name as bankName, b.statement_file_id as statementFileId, b.statement_file_name as statementFileName, b.file_digest as fileDigest, b.total_count as totalCount, b.matched_count as matchedCount, b.confirmed_count as confirmedCount, b.difference_count as differenceCount, b.batch_status as batchStatus, b.importer_name as importerName, b.import_time as importTime, b.created_at as createTime, b.updated_at as updateTime
